regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Nelson typically charge $35–$55/m² for supply and installation, with underlay included. Vinyl planks and LVT run $50–$80/m². Nelson's market is competitive; owner-operators often undercut showroom prices. Get at least two quotes.

businesses.name: Flatoutflooring Ltd
businesses.known_for: Owner-operator with 18 years experience specialising in carpet laying across Nelson-Tasman; handles small repairs through to full house installs including garage carpet.

businesses.name: Tony Haddon Builder
businesses.known_for: Qualified carpenter with 30 years in the industry offering carpet and vinyl flooring installation alongside full carpentry and renovation services across Nelson.

businesses.name: PlanB
businesses.known_for: Two-person team covering Nelson and Tasman for renovations, new builds, and carpet flooring installation with strong client feedback for quality and communication.
